summary: Successfully tested Lagos Pulse widget feature implementation. All backend API endpoints working with score fluctuation and active_scouts field. Frontend widget renders perfectly with animated score ring, energy tiers, top venues, and share functionality. All previous features still functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/v1/agent/city/pulse returns fluctuating scores (verified with 2 separate calls)
API response includes active_scouts field with values 3-12 as expected
Lagos Pulse widget renders in hero section with data-testid='lagos-pulse'
Pulse score displays and animates correctly (data-testid='pulse-score')
Energy tier bars render for electric/warming/quiet categories
Top 3 venues list shows venues with scores (Escape Nightclub, Quilox, Club Joker)
Share to Twitter button (data-testid='share-pulse') generates correct intent URL
Live Feed terminal still renders below pulse widget (data-testid='live-terminal')
Mobile responsiveness working for both widgets
All 12 backend API endpoints passing (100% success rate)
